text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see Winning Ticket walking toward me,
looking unusually gloomy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Listen, I really need to tell you
something!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You see... I went to this cool, new pastry shop.
But... but!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Right when I got there... they were sold out!
choice_data_list: Did you want to try it that bad?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Of course I wanted to try it! They sold out right before I got to the front of the line—it's so frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I lined up for an hour too, but I didn't get
anything! I'm still shaking from head to toe!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wish got there earlier... I'm such a dummy—a big,
big dummyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's sad cries resound down the
whole street.
